metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 📧 Phishing to Compromise Chain
---
Traces the full phishing attack chain — from email delivery through URL clicks and attachment detections, to post-delivery ZAP actions, through to whether the recipient's account or device was subsequently compromised. Joins MDO email telemetry with Entra sign-in risk signals and MDE alerts."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Email Threat Overview"},"name":"overview-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| summarize
    TotalEmails = count(),
    PhishEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Phish'),
    MalwareEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Malware'),
    SpamEmails = countif(ThreatTypes has 'Spam'),
    Delivered = countif(DeliveryAction == 'Delivered')
| project TotalEmails, PhishEmails, MalwareEmails, SpamEmails, Delivered","size":4,"title":"Email threat summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalEmails","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-email"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| summarize ThreatCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Phishing & malware emails over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-threat-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| summarize ThreatCount = count() by DeliveryAction
| sort by ThreatCount desc","size":3,"title":"Threat email delivery outcomes","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"customWidth":"25","name":"chart-delivery-outcomes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| where DeliveryAction == 'Delivered'
| summarize DeliveredThreats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"Threats delivered to inbox over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"DeliveredThreats","color":"redBright"}]}},"customWidth":"25","name":"chart-delivered-threats"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🎣 Phishing Emails — Delivered to Inbox"},"name":"phish-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| where DeliveryAction == 'Delivered'
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject, ThreatTypes, DeliveryLocation, LatestDeliveryAction, AttachmentCount, UrlCount
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Phishing emails delivered to inbox","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-phish-delivered"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count() by RecipientEmailAddress
| sort by PhishCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top targeted users by phishing volume","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"PhishCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-top-targets"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count() by SenderFromDomain
| sort by PhishCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top phishing sender domains","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"PhishCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-sender-domains"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Malicious URLs & Attachments"},"name":"url-attach-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish' or ThreatTypes has 'Malware'
| join kind=inner (
    EmailUrlInfo
    | project NetworkMessageId, Url, UrlDomain
) on NetworkMessageId
| summarize EmailCount = count() by UrlDomain
| sort by EmailCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Malicious URL domains in threat emails","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"EmailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-malicious-urls"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailAttachmentInfo
| where ThreatTypes has 'Malware' or ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, FileName, FileType, ThreatTypes, ThreatNames, SHA256
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Malicious attachments detected","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-malicious-attachments"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ⚡ ZAP Actions — Post-Delivery Remediation"},"name":"zap-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailPostDeliveryEvents
| summarize
    TotalActions = count(),
    PhishZAP = countif(ActionType == 'Phish ZAP'),
    MalwareZAP = countif(ActionType == 'Malware ZAP'),
    ManualRemediation = countif(ActionType == 'Manual remediation'),
    Failed = countif(ActionResult != 'Success')
| project TotalActions, PhishZAP, MalwareZAP, ManualRemediation, Failed","size":4,"title":"Post-delivery action summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalActions","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-zap"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailPostDeliveryEvents
| where ActionResult != 'Success'
| project TimeGenerated, RecipientEmailAddress, ActionType, ActionResult, ActionTrigger, DeliveryLocation, ThreatTypes
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Failed ZAP actions — emails not successfully remediated","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"ActionResult","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Success","representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-failed-zap"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Cross-Layer: Phishing Recipient → Account Risk → Device Alert"},"name":"correlation-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let PhishRecipients = EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| summarize PhishCount = count(), LastPhish = max(TimeGenerated), WasDelivered = countif(DeliveryAction == 'Delivered') by RecipientEmailAddress = tolower(RecipientEmailAddress);
let RiskySignins = SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| summarize RiskySigninCount = count(), LastRiskySignin = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName = tolower(UserPrincipalName);
PhishRecipients
| join kind=leftouter (
    RiskySignins
    | project RecipientEmailAddress = UserPrincipalName, RiskySigninCount, LastRiskySignin
) on RecipientEmailAddress
| project RecipientEmailAddress, PhishCount, WasDelivered, LastPhish, RiskySigninCount = coalesce(RiskySigninCount, 0), LastRiskySignin
| sort by RiskySigninCount desc, PhishCount desc","size":0,"title":"Phishing recipients who also had risky sign-ins — high priority investigation targets","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LastPhish","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"LastRiskySignin","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"PhishCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}},{"columnMatch":"RiskySigninCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"PhishCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-phish-risky"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let PhishRecipients = EmailEvents
| where ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| extend AccountName = tolower(tostring(split(RecipientEmailAddress, '@')[0]))
| summarize PhishCount = count() by AccountName, RecipientEmailAddress;
PhishRecipients
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityAlert
    | where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
    | summarize AlertCount = count(), AlertTypes = make_set(AlertName, 5) by AccountName = tolower(CompromisedEntity)
) on AccountName
| project RecipientEmailAddress, PhishCount, AlertCount = coalesce(AlertCount, 0), AlertTypes
| sort by AlertCount desc, PhishCount desc","size":0,"title":"Phishing recipients whose accounts also triggered MDE alerts","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AlertCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-phish-alerted"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EmailAttachmentInfo
| where ThreatTypes has 'Malware' or ThreatTypes has 'Phish'
| join kind=leftouter (
    EmailEvents
    | project NetworkMessageId, DeliveryAction, DeliveryLocation, Subject
) on NetworkMessageId
| project TimeGenerated, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, FileName, FileType, ThreatTypes, ThreatNames, DeliveryAction, SHA256
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Malicious attachments detected — with delivery outcome","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"DeviceCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":10}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-hash-correlation"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceFileEvents
| where isnotempty(FileOriginUrl)
| where FileOriginUrl has_any ('mail', 'outlook', 'sharepoint', 'attachment', 'safelinks')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FileOriginUrl, FolderPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Files downloaded from email origins on endpoints","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-device-email-files"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
